0: A wide-angle shot of an aged traditional Chinese study-bedroom, with cracked plaster walls, tall wooden windows, hanging calligraphy scrolls, an old wall map, dark wooden cabinets, and a simple bed covered with folded bedding. Soft daylight filters through the windows, illuminating a worn wooden writing desk with books, a desk lamp, and a wicker chair. The camera moves slowly forward and slightly downward toward the center of the room, then gradually levels into a calm horizontal view. The scene has a quiet, nostalgic atmosphere, with muted beige walls, warm wood tones, faded paper textures, and no modern objects.
121: A steady interior shot of the same old Chinese study-bedroom as the camera begins turning to the right from the writing desk area. The view gradually reveals the part of the room that was hidden from the starting frame: another weathered plaster wall, an old single wooden door, worn wooden trim, cracked corners, and the floor-wall junction around the doorway. The desk, books, lamp, wicker chair, cabinets, bed, hanging scrolls, and window light remain part of the surrounding space, while the newly revealed wall and door become the focus. The scene keeps its vintage, timeworn atmosphere and soft natural lighting.
